title: helichrysum monodianum
intro: Helichrysum monodianum, also known as the Corsican or Sardinian Helichrysum, is a perennial plant species within the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum monodianum lie in its essential oil, which contains compounds such as sesquiterpenes and flavonoids, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of using Helichrysum monodianum include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Helical preparations of Helichrysum monodianum include essential oils, tinctures, and infused oils, which can be used topically or internally, under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
